<!-- Thanks for contributing to scriba! -->

## Summary

<!-- What does this change and why? -->

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Refactor / cleanup
- [ ] CI / tooling

## Testing

- [ ] `python3 -m pytest tests/ -v` passes
- [ ] For pipeline/bash changes: ran on a real audio file end-to-end
- [ ] Added/updated tests for the change

## Checklist

- [ ] Default (accuracy) path behavior is unchanged unless intended
- [ ] No secrets, tokens, or private audio/transcripts committed
- [ ] Docs updated if behavior or flags changed (README / SKILL.md / AGENTS.md / references)
